title: Nullified Totems
description: Animates the Totem of Undying, along with totems from Netherite Extras (Icon shown), Friends&Foes, and More Totems.
body:
This is an attempt to add a bit of life to some items that protect yours, from blinking to fake crying to summoning clones, I hope you enjoy these animations, as simple as they are. 

There's support for the vanilla totem (of course), and modded totems from [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge), [More Totems of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-totems-of-undying), and [Netherite Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherite-extras).
